name: Page Menu
description: Multi-page embed menu with dropdown selection, button navigation, and full variable support.
author: Akashsuu

pages.title: 📖 Help — Commands
pages.description: Jump to this page via dropdown
pages.content:
**Available Commands**
`!help` — Show this menu
`!ping` — Check latency
`!serverinfo` — Server details

Requested by {mention}

pages.title: 🛡️ Help — Moderation
pages.content:
**Moderation Commands**
`!ban @user [reason]` — Ban a member
`!kick @user [reason]` — Kick a member
`!mute @user [time]` — Mute a member

Server: **{server}**

pages.title: ⚙️ Help — Utility
pages.content:
**Utility Commands**
`!serverinfo` — Server information
`!userinfo @user` — User information
`!menu` — This menu

📅 {date} · 🕐 {time}
